name: shici-zhaji
description: 本地离线古诗词学习工具
author: yeebo

scripts.desktop:run: npm run build:index:sqlite && npm run build:web:desktop-static && npm run prepare:desktop-static-runtime && electron electron/main-static.cjs
scripts.desktop:run:legacy: npm run build:web && npm run prepare:desktop-runtime && electron .
scripts.package:win: npm run build:index:sqlite && npm run build:web:desktop-static && npm run prepare:desktop-static-runtime && npm run prepare:desktop-lean-app && electron-builder --config electron-builder.static.lean.json --win nsis --x64
scripts.package:win:portable: npm run build:index:sqlite && npm run build:web:desktop-static && npm run prepare:desktop-static-runtime && npm run prepare:desktop-lean-app && electron-builder --config electron-builder.static.lean.json --win portable --x64
scripts.package:win:zip: npm run build:index:sqlite && npm run build:web:desktop-static && npm run prepare:desktop-static-runtime && npm run prepare:desktop-lean-app && SHICI_BUILDER_CONFIG=electron-builder.static.lean.json XDG_RUNTIME_DIR=/tmp node scripts/package-win-zip.js
scripts.package:win:zip:mini: npm run generate:mini && npm run build:web:desktop-static && npm run prepare:desktop-static-runtime && npm run prepare:desktop-lean-app && SHICI_BUILDER_CONFIG=electron-builder.static.lean.json SHICI_ZIP_SUFFIX=mini XDG_RUNTIME_DIR=/tmp node scripts/package-win-zip.js
scripts.package:win:dir: npm run build:index:sqlite && npm run build:web:desktop-static && npm run prepare:desktop-static-runtime && npm run prepare:desktop-lean-app && electron-builder --config electron-builder.static.lean.json --win dir --x64
scripts.package:win:legacy: npm run build:web && npm run prepare:desktop-runtime && electron-builder --config electron-builder.legacy.json --win portable --x64
scripts.package:win:legacy:nsis: npm run build:web && npm run prepare:desktop-runtime && electron-builder --config electron-builder.legacy.json --win nsis --x64
scripts.mobile:build:mini:web: node scripts/generate-data.js --profile mini && npm run build:web:mobile-static && npm run prepare:mobile-static-runtime
scripts.mobile:android:sync:mini: npm run mobile:build:mini:web && npx cap sync android
scripts.mobile:android:copy:mini: npm run mobile:build:mini:web && npx cap copy android
scripts.mobile:android:apk:release:quick: npx cap copy android && npm run mobile:android:signing:prepare && npm run mobile:android:apk:release
scripts.mobile:android:apk:release:auto: npm run mobile:android:sync:mini && npm run mobile:android:signing:prepare && npm run mobile:android:apk:release
scripts.generate:full: node scripts/generate-data.js --profile full && npm run build:index:sqlite
scripts.generate:mini: node scripts/generate-data.js --profile mini && npm run build:index:sqlite
